behaviors.description: The speech-to-text output preserves speaker labels so that the summary can attribute statements to specific attendees.
behaviors.justification: Failure depends on real STT model diarization quality (speaker-label preservation), not just wrapper logic. A stubbed STT response would hide this failure. Rejected Workflow: behavior text targets one model judgment boundary (STT label fidelity), not multiple agentic decisions in sequence.
behaviors.test_description: Run real audio with multiple speakers through the real STT API and assert transcript chunks retain correct speaker labels for attendee attribution downstream.

behaviors.description: Transcript parsing extracts explicit task assignments (assignee + task text) into the summary input structure.
behaviors.justification: This is deterministic parsing/structuring logic on transcript text and schema mapping within local code; no real infra or model output is required to expose failures.
behaviors.test_description: Call the parser with crafted transcript lines containing explicit assignments and assert exact assignee/task extraction into the internal summary-input object.

behaviors.description: The live summary output contains at least one action item for every attendee who was assigned a task during the meeting.
behaviors.justification: Correctness depends on real LLM summarization decisions (coverage of assignees in action items). Deterministic mocks would always pass and miss real omission failures. Rejected Workflow: behavior can be validated with one real summarization decision given a prepared transcript/context.
behaviors.test_description: Provide a transcript with explicit assignments for multiple attendees to the real summarization model and assert each assigned attendee appears in at least one returned action item.

behaviors.description: Decision extraction logic routes identified decisions into the `decisions` section schema rather than generic narrative fields.
behaviors.justification: This is a module-handoff/orchestration failure: identified decisions must flow into the correct structured section across extraction-to-formatting components. No real OS/network/subprocess needed. Rejected Agentic: behavior text says "identified decisions" (already identified), so this test targets routing/wiring, not model judgment quality.
behaviors.test_description: Wire extraction output into the summary formatter in-process and assert decision records populate `decisions` schema fields and do not appear only in narrative fields.

behaviors.description: Key decisions mentioned in the transcript appear in the live summary's `decisions` section, not buried in the narrative.
behaviors.justification: The model must judge what is a key decision and place it correctly; this depends on real LLM output content. Stubs hide misclassification/placement failures. Rejected Workflow: can be tested at a single summarization step from transcript to structured summary.
behaviors.test_description: Send transcripts containing explicit decision statements to the real summarization model and assert those decisions are present in `decisions` entries rather than only narrative text.

behaviors.description: When the audio file is longer than 60 minutes, the service splits it into segments and processes them sequentially, merging the results into a single coherent summary.
behaviors.justification: Behavior explicitly requires multiple sequential processing steps with merge coherence across segments, i.e., chained agentic outputs and state carryover. A single-step or mocked test would miss cross-step degradation and merge errors.
behaviors.test_description: Use a real >60-minute recording, execute real segmenting + per-segment transcription/summarization sequence, then assert merged final summary preserves continuity and consolidated structure across segments.

behaviors.description: The full pipeline (upload audio, transcribe, summarize, deliver structured output) completes without manual intervention for a real meeting recording.
behaviors.justification: This is an end-to-end multi-stage pipeline with real upload/transcription/summarization/output delivery and multiple agentic steps. Lower levels cannot catch cross-stage failure propagation or automation breakdowns.
behaviors.test_description: Run a real meeting recording through the production-like pipeline (upload -> STT -> LLM summary -> output delivery) and assert successful completion and valid structured payload without human intervention.
